name_en: Top-tier original factory with full packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier original factory with full packaging
Lady 5-Compartment Suede Rock Grey in stock!!️
The matte series is both practical and exquisite, and suede is much more durable than lambskin🙃. It stands out when worn, can be sweet or chic, and is both casual and elegant. The most unique 3-Compartment Lady of the season🌚
Size:24cm
